qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_motivo_consulta as oi_motivo_consulta, t0.c_motivo_consulta as c_motivo_consulta, t0.d_motivo_consulta as d_motivo_consulta, SEC.policy, t0.c_motivo_consulta as CODE, t0.d_motivo_consulta as TEXT FROM MED05_MOTIVOS_CONS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.MedicinaLaboral.MotivosConsulta.MOTIVO_CONSULTA\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_motivo_consulta LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_motivo_consulta asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_motivo_consulta as oi_motivo_consulta, SEC.policy FROM MED05_MOTIVOS_CONS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.MedicinaLaboral.MotivosConsulta.MOTIVO_CONSULTA\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_motivo_consulta LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_motivo_consulta asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.MedicinaLaboral.MotivosConsulta.MOTIVO_CONSULTA.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.MedicinaLaboral.MotivosConsulta.MOTIVO_CONSULTA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(MED05_MOTIVOS_CONS.oi_motivo_consulta) as CNT from MED05_MOTIVOS_CONS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and MED05_MOTIVOS_CONS.oi_motivo_consulta={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(MED05_MOTIVOS_CONS.d_motivo_consulta,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(MED05_MOTIVOS_CONS.c_motivo_consulta,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
